name: Chili II
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the cooking oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Brown the ground meat, breaking it apart with a spoon until no longer pink.
3. Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
4. Stir in seasonings to taste.
5. Drain any excess fat from the chili sauce bottle, then pour in the sauce along with the whole tomatoes.
6. Melt the chili stick over low heat, stirring it into the mixture.
7. Add water, sugar, salt, pepper, Mexene chili powder, and cayenne pepper.
8. Stir to combine all ingredients evenly.
9. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 1 1/2 hours, stirring occasionally.
10. Stir in the red beans (or more) and cook an additional half hour until the beans are tender.
